control_awareness: The amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001) requires department_head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000. Segregation of duties (P2P-C-002) prevents self-approval but does not block request creation. Pre-PO approval (P2P-C-003) mandates approval before purchase order issuance.
expected_control_effect: The system will route the request to the department_head for approval before any purchase order is issued.
overall_reason: Given no quarter-end pressure and the preference for a straightforward, auditable plan, creating one consolidated purchase request for the full amount is operationally reasonable and aligns with all control requirements and approval thresholds.
reason: The total amount exceeds the department_head approval threshold (1,000,000), so one consolidated purchase request is appropriate to trigger the required approval level and keep the process straightforward and auditable.
